message: agent1: working on extracting normalize_image_bytes helper in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (image_to_base64 method). Will touch only that file.
agent2: implementing get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor on ImageBlock in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py. Will touch ImageBlock class / image_to_base64 method only.

agent1: I've added normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) helper in types.py and refactored image_to_base64 to use it. If your get_image_mimetype() also touches image_to_base64, please build on top of normalize_image_bytes so we don't clobber each other. I'll merge your branch before submitting.
agent2: pushed my get_image_mimetype() change to types.py (agent2 branch). Ping me when you push your normalize_image_bytes work so I can merge before submitting.

agent1: merged your get_image_mimetype() into my branch — resolved by having image_to_base64 temporarily set self.image to decoded_for_guessing (raw bytes) before calling get_image_mimetype(), then setting it to the final encoded_image. Tests pass. Pushing now.

agent2: merged your normalize_image_bytes work into agent2 branch cleanly. image_to_base64 now calls self.get_image_mimetype() first (raw bytes, before encoding), which internally calls normalize_image_bytes for robust guessing. All 12 tests in tests/base/llms/test_types.py pass. Pushed to team/agent2.
